Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to occur after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average duration of the period starting at SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and ending at SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time until SW-Awaiting AE Assignment is followed by any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-EIC Reject in rejection-ending variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where reviewers eventually agree
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Assignment before transitioning to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection, compared to the total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in end-to-end acceptance or rejection paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to be succeeded by SW-AE Assign Reviewers, specifically in variants involving reviewer reminders or delays
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that proceed directly to editor assignment without checklist delays
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex variants with multiple reviewer declines and reassignments
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and the first reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that reach the recommendation stage
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
